accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
theme token-api token-value token
style
pattern

DSDS Token Value Definition

A displayable representation of a design token's value for documentation tools. Captures the resolved value, any alias reference, and an optional link to the authoritative DTCG file.

Source: tokens/token-value.schema.json

tokenValue

A displayable representation of the token's value for documentation tools.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
resolvedstringoptionalThe resolved value as a human-readable string (e.g., '#1a1a1a', '16px', '400', 'rgb(0, 85, 179)').
referencestringoptionalIf this token is an alias, the name of the referenced token (e.g., 'color.neutral.900', 'spacing.base').
dtcgFilestringoptionalURI or relative path to the W3C Design Tokens Format (DTCG) file containing the authoritative value.

Example

[
  {
    "resolved": "#1a1a1a",
    "reference": "color.neutral.900",
    "dtcgFile": "./tokens/color.tokens.json"
  },
  {
    "resolved": "16px",
    "reference": "spacing.base",
    "dtcgFile": "./tokens/spacing.tokens.json"
  },
  {
    "resolved": "#0055b3"
  },
  {
    "resolved": "400",
    "reference": "font.weight.regular"
  },
  {
    "resolved": "0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)",
    "reference": "shadow.elevation.low",
    "dtcgFile": "./tokens/elevation.tokens.json"
  }
]
↑ Back to top
